buckets.description: Questions testing the absorption of water by roots and its upward movement through the water-carrying tubes (xylem).
Questions testing the process of photosynthesis in leaves and the distribution of manufactured food through the food-carrying tubes (phloem).
Questions testing water loss (transpiration) and the exchange of gases through tiny openings (stomata) on the leaves.
Questions testing the interaction between the water and food transport systems or how different parts work together for overall plant function.
